94.reason: [Operator precedence: '=' has lower precedence than '==', so it should be (ce = getchar()) == '\n' or better: if (getchar() == '\n')]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Operator precedence error: '=' has lower precedence than '==', so it's equivalent to ce = (getchar() == '\n'). This assigns 0 or 1 to ce, but more critically, the condition breaks after first pair even if input continues. Also, getchar() may consume space or newline unpredictably.]
